cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its adorable behavior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute Pokémon is rarely found.

ataques.name: Invitación de Avistamiento Lunar
ataques.text: Busca en tu baraja hasta 3 Clefairy y ponlos en tu Banca. Después, baraja las cartas de tu baraja.

ataques.name: Follow Me
ataques.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

ataques.name: More Moon
ataques.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, take 1 more Prize card.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they're usually found in quiet places.

ataques.name: Señuelo
ataques.text: Cambia 1 de los Pokémon en Banca de tu rival por el Pokémon que esté en el Puesto Activo.

ataques.name: Más Luna
ataques.text: Si un Pokémon de tu rival queda Fuera de Combate por el daño de este ataque, coge 1 carta de Premio más.

habilidades.name: Semi-Blooming Energy
habilidades.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and attach any number of Basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched.

habilidades.name: Floración Parcial de Energía
habilidades.text: Cuando juegas este Pokémon de tu mano para hacer evolucionar a uno de tus Pokémon durante tu turno, puedes mirar las 3 primeras cartas de tu baraja y unir cualquier cantidad de cartas de Energía Básica que encuentres entre ellas a tus Pokémon de la manera que desees. Pon el resto de las cartas de nuevo en tu baraja y barájalas todas.

habilidades.name: Fully Blooming Energy
habilidades.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may look at the top 8 cards of your deck and attach any number of Basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

habilidades.name: Floración Total de Energía
habilidades.text: Cuando juegas este Pokémon de tu mano para hacer evolucionar a uno de tus Pokémon durante tu turno, puedes mirar las 8 primeras cartas de tu baraja y unir cualquier cantidad de cartas de Energía Básica que encuentres entre ellas a tus Pokémon de la manera que desees. Pon el resto de las cartas de nuevo en tu baraja y barájalas todas.

ataques.name: Spore Ball
ataques.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: The mushrooms, known as tochukaso, are controlling the bug. Even if the bug bugs the mushrooms, they tell it to bug off.

ataques.name: Bola Espora
ataques.text: El Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Dormido.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow.

ataques.name: Spread Filaments
ataques.text: Flip 2 coins. Search your deck for a number of Grass Pokémon up to the number of heads and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: The bug is mostly dead, with the mushroom on its back having become the main body. If the mushroom comes off, the bug stops moving.

ataques.name: Filamentos Dispersos
ataques.text: Lanza 2 monedas. Busca en tu baraja una cantidad de Pokémon {G} igual o inferior al número de caras que te hayan salido y ponlos en tu Banca. Después, baraja las cartas de tu baraja.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It lives about one yard underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

ataques.name: Blazing Destruction
ataques.text: Discard a Stadium in play.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

ataques.name: Destrucción Abrasadora
ataques.text: Descarta 1 Estadio en juego.

habilidades.name: Cocoon Cover
habilidades.text: Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to this Pokémon. (Damage is not an effect.)

cartas.descripcionPokedex: While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.

habilidades.name: Capullo Caparazón
habilidades.text: Se evitan todos los efectos de los ataques usados por los Pokémon de tu rival e infligidos a este Pokémon. (El daño no es un efecto).

ataques.name: Fire Blast
ataques.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

ataques.name: Llamarada
ataques.text: Descarta 1 Energía de este Pokémon.

ataques.name: Leaf Munch
ataques.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Grass Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

ataques.name: Mascahojas
ataques.text: Si el Pokémon Activo de tu rival es un Pokémon {G}, este ataque hace 30 puntos de daño más.

ataques.name: Defensive Posture
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can't withstand a harsh attack.

ataques.name: Postura Defensiva
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, durante el próximo turno de tu rival, se evita todo el daño infligido a este Pokémon por ataques.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.
Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

ataques.name: Fly
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.

ataques.name: Vuelo
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cruz, este ataque no hace nada. Si sale cara, durante el próximo turno de tu rival, se evitan todo el daño y todos los efectos de los ataques infligidos a este Pokémon.

habilidades.name: Electrical Grounding
habilidades.text: When 1 of your Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, you may move a Lightning Energy from that Pokémon to this Pokémon.

ataques.name: Thunder
ataques.text: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

habilidades.name: Toma de Tierra
habilidades.text: Cuando uno de tus Pokémon queda Fuera de Combate por el daño de un ataque de los Pokémon de tu rival, puedes mover 1 Energía {L} de ese Pokémon a este Pokémon.

ataques.name: Trueno
ataques.text: Este Pokémon también se hace 50 puntos de daño a sí mismo.

habilidades.name: Sand Screen
habilidades.text: Trainer cards in your opponent's discard pile can't be put into their deck by an effect of your opponent's Item or Supporter cards.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

habilidades.name: Pantalla de Arena
habilidades.text: Las cartas de Entrenador en la pila de descartes de tu rival no pueden ponerse en su baraja por ningún efecto de las cartas de Objeto o de Partidario de tu rival.

ataques.name: Rumble
ataques.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

ataques.name: Spike Rend
ataques.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It climbs trees by hooking on with its sharp claws. Sandslash shares the berries it gathers, dropping them down to Sandshrew waiting below the tree.

ataques.name: Retumbar
ataques.text: Durante el próximo turno de tu rival, el Pokémon Defensor no puede retirarse.

ataques.name: Púas Desgarradoras
ataques.text: Si el Pokémon Activo de tu rival ya tiene algún contador de daño sobre él, este ataque hace 100 puntos de daño más.

ataques.name: Queen Press
ataques.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It pacifies offspring by placing them in the gaps between the spines on its back. The spines will never secrete poison while young are present.

ataques.name: Presión Reina
ataques.text: Durante el próximo turno de tu rival, se evita todo el daño infligido a este Pokémon por ataques de Pokémon Básicos.

ataques.name: Lead
ataques.text: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

ataques.name: Stompy Stomp
ataques.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

ataques.name: Liderazgo
ataques.text: Busca en tu baraja 1 carta de Partidario, enséñala y ponla en tu mano. Después, baraja las cartas de tu baraja.

ataques.name: Pisotonazo
ataques.text: Lanza 2 monedas. Este ataque hace 20 puntos de daño por cada cara.

habilidades.name: Revealing Echo
habilidades.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may have your opponent reveal their hand.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Zubat live in caves, down where the sun's light won't reach. In the morning, they gather together to keep each other warm as they sleep.

habilidades.name: Eco Revelador
habilidades.text: Una vez durante tu turno, si este Pokémon está en el Puesto Activo, puedes hacer que tu rival enseñe las cartas de su mano.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.

ataques.name: Perplexing Powder
ataques.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

ataques.name: Polvareda Desconcertante
ataques.text: El Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Confundido. Durante el próximo turno de tu rival, este no puede jugar ninguna carta de Objeto de su mano.

ataques.name: Nadir Needle
ataques.text: If you have no cards in your hand, this attack does 120 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.

ataques.name: Aguijón Nadir
ataques.text: Si no tienes ninguna carta en tu mano, este ataque hace 120 puntos de daño más, y el Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Envenenado y Paralizado.

ataques.name: Second Bite
ataques.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its whiskers are essential for maintaining its balance. No matter how friendly you are, it will get angry and bite you if you touch its whiskers.

ataques.name: Segundo Mordisco
ataques.text: Este ataque hace 30 puntos de daño más por cada contador de daño en el Pokémon Activo de tu rival.

ataques.name: Beak Catch
ataques.text: Search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Carrying food through Fearow's territory is dangerous. It will snatch the food away from you in a flash!

ataques.name: Captura Pico
ataques.text: Busca en tu baraja hasta 3 cartas y ponlas en tu mano. Después, baraja las cartas de tu baraja.

ataques.name: Super Singe
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.

ataques.name: Superquemadura
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, el Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Quemado.

ataques.name: Skill Dive
ataques.text: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its feet are tiny, but this Pokémon walks skillfully. It sneaks up on sleeping prey before sinking in its fangs and slurping up blood.

ataques.name: Técnica de Buceo
ataques.text: Este ataque hace 40 puntos de daño a uno de los Pokémon de tu rival. (No apliques Debilidad y Resistencia a los Pokémon en Banca).

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Poison oozes from all over its body. It catches small bug Pokémon at night that are attracted by light.

ataques.name: Come Here Right Meow
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

ataques.name: Ven Aquí Ya
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, cambia 1 de los Pokémon en Banca de tu rival por el Pokémon que esté en el Puesto Activo.

habilidades.name: Rocket Call
habilidades.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Giovanni's Charisma card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

habilidades.name: Llamar al Rocket
habilidades.text: Una vez durante tu turno, puedes buscar en tu baraja 1 carta de Carisma de Giovanni, enseñarla y ponerla en tu mano. Después, baraja las cartas de tu baraja.

ataques.name: Torrid Torrent
ataques.text: Attach up to 2 Basic Fire Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

ataques.name: Dynamite Fang
ataques.text: Discard 2 Fire Energy from this Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: An ancient picture scroll shows that people were captivated by its movement as it ran through prairies.

ataques.name: Torrente Tórrido
ataques.text: Une hasta 2 cartas de Energía {R} Básica de tu pila de descartes a este Pokémon.

ataques.name: Colmillo Dinamita
ataques.text: Descarta 2 Energías {R} de este Pokémon.

ataques.name: Overthink
ataques.text: During your opponent's next turn, whenever they flip a coin, treat it as tails.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

ataques.name: Cavilar
ataques.text: Durante el próximo turno de tu rival, cada vez que este lance una moneda, se considerará que ha salido cruz.

ataques.name: Bubble
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: In rivers with fast-flowing water, this Pokémon will cling to a rock by using its thick lips, which act like a suction cup.

ataques.name: Burbuja
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, el Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Paralizado.

ataques.name: Frog Hop
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: This Pokémon's sweat is a slimy mucus. When captured, Poliwhirl can slither from its enemies' grasp and escape.

ataques.name: Salto de la Rana
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, este ataque hace 60 puntos de daño más.

ataques.name: Slow-Acting Acid
ataques.text: At the end of your opponent's next turn, put 12 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Once ingested into this Pokémon's body, even the hardest object will melt into nothing.

ataques.name: Ácido de Acción Lenta
ataques.text: Al final del próximo turno de tu rival, pon 12 contadores de daño en el Pokémon Defensor.

ataques.name: Vaporize
ataques.text: Discard a Water Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

ataques.name: Vaporizar
ataques.text: Descarta 1 Energía {W} del Pokémon Activo de tu rival.

ataques.name: Teleportation Attack
ataques.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: This Pokémon's telekinesis is immensely powerful. To prepare for evolution, Kadabra stores up psychic energy in the star on its forehead.

ataques.name: Ataque Teleportador
ataques.text: Cambia este Pokémon por uno de tus Pokémon en Banca.

ataques.name: Mountain Mashing
ataques.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Always brimming with power, it passes time by lifting boulders. Doing so makes it even stronger.

ataques.name: Aplastamiento Montaña
ataques.text: Descarta la primera carta de la baraja de tu rival.

ataques.name: Bind Down
ataques.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.

ataques.name: Amarrar
ataques.text: Durante el próximo turno de tu rival, el Pokémon Defensor no puede retirarse.

ataques.name: Thrash
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

ataques.name: Saña
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cruz, este Pokémon también se hace 20 puntos de daño a sí mismo. Si sale cara, este ataque hace 20 puntos de daño más.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Abra can teleport in its sleep. Apparently the more deeply Abra sleeps, the farther its teleportations go.

ataques.name: Mountain Ramming
ataques.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

ataques.name: Empuje Montaña
ataques.text: Descarta la primera carta de la baraja de tu rival.

habilidades.name: Guts
habilidades.text: If this Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, flip a coin. If heads, this Pokémon is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.

ataques.name: Mountain Chopping
ataques.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: With four arms that react more quickly than it can think, it can execute many punches at once.

habilidades.name: Agallas
habilidades.text: Si este Pokémon fuese a quedar Fuera de Combate por el daño de un ataque, lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, este Pokémon no queda Fuera de Combate, y sus PS restantes pasan a ser 10.

ataques.name: Tajo Montaña
ataques.text: Descarta las 2 primeras cartas de la baraja de tu rival.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It spits out Poison Powder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.

ataques.name: Aquatic Rescue
ataques.text: Put up to 4 Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its forehead somehow begins to glow.

ataques.name: Rescate Acuático
ataques.text: Pon hasta 4 Pokémon de tu pila de descartes en tu mano.

ataques.name: Rant and Rave
ataques.text: This Pokémon is now Confused.

ataques.name: Raging Smash
ataques.text: If this Pokémon isn't Confused, this attack does nothing.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.

ataques.name: Despotricar
ataques.text: Este Pokémon pasa a estar Confundido.

ataques.name: Golpe Rabioso
ataques.text: Si este Pokémon no está Confundido, este ataque no hace nada.

ataques.name: Bubble Beam
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

ataques.name: Heroic Punch
ataques.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 150 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Poliwrath is skilled at both swimming and martial arts. It uses its well-trained arms to dish out powerful punches.

ataques.name: Rayo Burbuja
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, el Pokémon Activo de tu rival pasa a estar Paralizado.

ataques.name: Puño Heroico
ataques.text: Lanza 1 moneda. Si sale cara, este ataque hace 150 puntos de daño más.

habilidades.name: Primordial Tentacles
habilidades.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Active Pokémon can't retreat.

ataques.name: Aqua Split
ataques.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Omastar's sharp fangs could crush rock, but the Pokémon can attack only the prey that come within reach of its tentacles.

habilidades.name: Tentáculos Primordiales
habilidades.text: Mientras este Pokémon esté en el Puesto Activo, el Pokémon Activo de tu rival no puede retirarse.

ataques.name: Isoaqua
ataques.text: Este ataque también hace 30 puntos de daño a 2 de los Pokémon en Banca de tu rival. (No apliques Debilidad y Resistencia a los Pokémon en Banca).

ataques.name: Devolution Ray
ataques.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an evolved Pokémon, devolve it by putting the highest Stage Evolution card on it into your opponent's hand.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Aerodactyl's sawlike fangs can shred skin to tatters—even the skin of Steel-type Pokémon.

ataques.name: Rayo Involutivo
ataques.text: Si el Pokémon Activo de tu rival es un Pokémon evolucionado, involuciónalo poniendo la carta de Evolución de fase más alta que tenga sobre él en la mano de tu rival.

habilidades.name: Voraciousness
habilidades.text: Once during your turn, you may put up to 2 Leftovers cards from your discard pile into your hand.

ataques.name: Thudding Press
ataques.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: This Pokémon's stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.

habilidades.name: Glotonería
habilidades.text: Una vez durante tu turno, puedes poner hasta 2 cartas de Restos de tu pila de descartes en tu mano.

ataques.name: Presión Sorda
ataques.text: Este Pokémon también se hace 30 puntos de daño a sí mismo.

ataques.name: Double Scratch
ataques.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: While some say this species has gone extinct, Kabuto sightings are apparently fairly common in some places.

ataques.name: Arañazo Doble
ataques.text: Lanza 2 monedas. Este ataque hace 70 puntos de daño por cada cara.

habilidades.name: Ancient Way
habilidades.text: Apply Weakness for your opponent's Active Pokémon as ×4 instead.

ataques.name: Draining Blade
ataques.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: The cause behind the extinction of this species is unknown. Kabutops were aggressive Pokémon that inhabited warm seas.

habilidades.name: Modo Ancestral
habilidades.text: Aplica una Debilidad de x 4 al Pokémon Activo de tu rival.

ataques.name: Cuchilla Drenaje
ataques.text: Cura 30 puntos de daño a este Pokémon.

habilidades.name: Ice Float
habilidades.text: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

ataques.name: Blizzard
ataques.text: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

cartas.descripcionPokedex: This Pokémon can control ice at will. Articuno is said to live in snowy mountains riddled with permafrost.

habilidades.name: Flotación Glacial
habilidades.text: Si este Pokémon tiene alguna Energía {W} unida, no tiene ningún Coste de Retirada.

ataques.name: Ventisca
ataques.text: Este ataque también hace 10 puntos de daño a cada uno de los Pokémon en Banca de tu rival. (No apliques Debilidad y Resistencia a los Pokémon en Banca).

ataques.name: Aqua Slash
ataques.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

ataques.name: Cuchillada Acuática
ataques.text: Durante tu próximo turno, este Pokémon no puede atacar.

habilidades.name: Jet Cruise
habilidades.text: Your Pokémon in play have no Retreat Cost.

ataques.name: Dragon Pulse
ataques.text: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: It is said that somewhere in the ocean lies an island where these gather. Only they live there.

habilidades.name: Travesía Propulsión
habilidades.text: Tus Pokémon en juego no tienen ningún Coste de Retirada.

ataques.name: Pulso Dragón
ataques.text: Descarta las 2 primeras cartas de tu baraja.

reglas: Look at the top 8 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Pokémon you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

es.efecto: Mira las 8 primeras cartas de tu baraja. Puedes enseñar cualquier cantidad de Pokémon que encuentres entre ellas y ponerlos en tu mano. Pon el resto de las cartas de nuevo en tu baraja y barájalas todas.

reglas: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a Basic Energy card from their hand in order to draw a card.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

es.efecto: Una vez durante el turno de cada jugador, ese jugador puede descartar 1 carta de Energía Básica de su mano para poder robar una carta.

reglas: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you put a Pokémon you find there on the bottom of their deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

es.efecto: Tu rival enseña las cartas de su mano, y tú pones 1 Pokémon que encuentres entre ellas en la parte inferior de su baraja.

reglas: At the end of your turn, if the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, heal 20 damage from it.
You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.

es.efecto: Al final de tu turno, si el Pokémon al que está unida esta carta está en el Puesto Activo, cúrale 20 puntos de daño.

ataques.name: Leaf Munch
ataques.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Grass Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

cartas.descripcionPokedex: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

ataques.name: Mascahojas
ataques.text: Si el Pokémon Activo de tu rival es un Pokémon {G}, este ataque hace 30 puntos de daño más.

ataques.name: Charge
ataques.text: Search your deck for a Basic Lightning Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
